description: R2a L3 record-type resolution goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Each <fixture>.l3rt.golden.json is the ALLOWLISTED record-type projection of a RESOLVED SemanticModel captured POST-RESOLVE / PRE-SUMMARY (`indexWorkspace` → `resolveModel`, BEFORE any L4 summary / combined-graph / composeSnapshot). Per routine: each record variable's + operation's resolved `tableId` as a StableTableId (`${appGuid}:Table:${number}`), OMITTED when unresolved (table not in the workspace symbol table). Per Table: the MERGED field set (after mergeExtensionFields), in stable id form. See scripts/r2a-l3-projection.ts.
note: R2a captures `recordVariable.tableId` / `recordOperation.tableId` (set by resolveRecordTypes: declared vars → ops → unified-scope fallback → implicit Rec/xRec via the effective-own-table for Table/Page/TableExtension/PageExtension) + the merged TableExtension fields (mergeExtensionFields). resolveRecordTypes/mergeExtensionFields are sub-steps 2+3 of resolveSemanticGraph; tableId/fields are never re-touched by resolveCalls/buildEventGraph/buildCoverage, so reading the model straight out of resolveModel is a clean record-type capture. UNRESOLVED tableId → key OMITTED (never guessed). EXCLUDED (later gates): call graph (R2b), event graph (R2c), coverage/gaps (R2d), typedEdges (L4/R3), capability resourceId (R2d), argumentBindings upgrades (R2b). Cross-app record-types (.app deps) → R2.5.

exclusions.reason: empty model (0 objects/0 routines) — fail-closed single-app provider; not source-only-analyzable
